subject: docs(todo): live spot-checks correct repo-tor + few-lap + first-pass tool-till-tees
body:
After the sun-sea-o stale-snapshot surprise, spot-checked the other
repos pushed recently (2026-04-21) for similar drift. Two more false
gaps found + one deferred audit now covered.

repo-tor — FULLY RESOLVED (correction):
- DOWNLOAD_PDF is actually done by design. Header.jsx:187 has
  { label: 'Save as PDF', action: () => window.print() }.
- dashboard/styles.css header comment documents the design choice:
  "JSX consumers use Tailwind's `print:hidden` variant directly on
  chrome they want hidden" — intentional, not a missing .no-print
  class. My earlier "new gap" claim was wrong.
- Gap Matrix: DOWNLOAD_PDF Partial -> Pass.

few-lap — EVENT_BUS already decided:
- CLAUDE.md:747-751 has "Not Applicable Patterns" section with
  EVENT_BUS rationale and 2026-04-18 timestamp. Supabase queries
  via hooks + FilterContext + debugLog internal pub/sub cover
  current needs.
- Gap Matrix: EVENT_BUS Missing -> N/A.
- __DEV__ guard: confirmed STILL missing (3 TEMPORARY comments
  remain at lines 6, 218, 353). Updated line pointers in TODO.
- DOWNLOAD_PDF: confirmed still absent.

tool-till-tees — first-pass audit (replaces `?` placeholders):
- Hybrid: Vercel backend API + minimal React 19/Vite landing page.
  Supabase-backed. Serves 4 frontend consumers (four-ems,
  glow-props, see-veo, sun-sea-o).
- CLAUDE.md still in old format: Suggested Implementations section
  (line 521), HISTORY.md workflow (line 283), "Communication style"
  bullet only (line 392), old "## Triggers" section (line 397).
- docs/HISTORY.md exists.
- Gap Matrix row populated: most patterns N/A (no burger menu,
  debug pill, PWA, Z-index, icon cache, PDF on a brochureware
  landing page). CLAUDE.md Missing, APP_ICONS Partial, THEME +
  EVENT_BUS pending decision.
- Added full per-repo section with 6 sub-sections: CLAUDE.md
  alignment, HISTORY.md removal, Triggers replace, APP_ICONS audit,
  THEME_DARK_MODE decide, EVENT_BUS evaluate.
- Flagged backend-specific patterns that may warrant upstreaming
  into glow-props (CORS discipline, env schema validation, RLS
  policy tests, etc.).

Updated Cross-Cutting Gaps summary: 4 repos now in "Fully clean"
tier (canva-grid, budgy-ting, repo-tor, sun-sea-o).

Tags: documentation, audit, todo, correction, cross-fleet
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
